title: Opening for Production Engineer at Patanjali Ayurved

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Patanjali Ayurved
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
